data.biography:
Joe Tippett (born March 1, 1982) is an American actor. He is known for playing Sam Strickland in the NBC drama series Rise and John Ross in the HBO crime drama miniseries Mare of Easttown.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Joe Tippett, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Joe Tippett

data.biography:
Joe Tippett (ur. 1 marca 1982) jest amerykańskim aktorem. Znany jest z roli Sama Stricklanda w serialu NBC Rise i Johna Rossa w miniserialu kryminalnym HBO Mare of Easttown.
